extension.summary: AliveTR and VOD addon By don24crk
extension.description: AliveTR By don24crk is an addon allowing streaming content available mostly in Turk language.
extension.disclaimer: AliveTR By don24crk's author does not host, stream or distribute any of the content displayed inside this software and cannot be held responsible for the quality or availability of the listed streams. On demand content is scraped from various websites and is freely available on the internet on public domains. This software acts only as a search engine. Kindly note that AliveTR By don24crk is not an official part of the media player you are running, and therefore not to be mentioned within official support channels, this addon has nothing to do with the media player itself, nor it’s intended use, it is simply a third party plugin which has been added to your system and it is provided "as is" with no warranty.

extension.summary: Filme, TV, Musik, User-Clips und Live-Streams
Movies, TV, Music, User-Clips, and Livestreams
Films, Séries TV, Musique, Clips, et Live
סרטים, טלוויזיה, מוסיקה, סירטונים של המשתמש, תלת מימד והזרמה חיה
extension.description: Dailymotion zieht 300 Millionen Nutzer aus der ganzen Welt an, die jeden Monat 3,5 Milliarden Videos auf ihrem Player ansehen.
Dailymotion attracts 300 million users from around the world, who watch 3.5 billion videos on its player each month.
Dailymotion attire 300 millions d’utilisateurs qui regardent 3,5 milliards de vidéos sur son player chaque mois, à travers le monde.
Dailymotion מושך 300 מיליון משתמשים מרחבי העולם שצופים ב -3.5 מיליארד סרטונים מדי חודש.
extension.disclaimer: Einige Teile dieses Addons sind in Ihrem Wohnsitzland möglicherweise nicht legal. Bitte informieren Sie sich vor der Installation bei den örtlichen Gesetzen.
Some parts of this addon may not be legal in your country of residence - please check with your local laws before installing.
Certaines parties de cet addon peuvent ne pas être légales dans votre pays de résidence - s’il vous plaît vérifier avec vos lois locales avant d’installer.
ייתכן שחלק מהתוספות האלו אינן חוקיות בארץ המגורים שלך - אנא בדוק את החוקים המקומיים שלך לפני ההתקנה.
extension.news: [B]Version 2.4.4 - 02 Nov 2024[/B] - Use videoinfotag instead of setinfo on Kodi 20+ - Fix playback issues

extension.summary: GreekTV and VOD addon By don24crk
extension.description: GreekTV By don24crk is an addon allowing streaming content available mostly in Greek language.
extension.disclaimer: GreekTV By don24crk's author does not host, stream or distribute any of the content displayed inside this software and cannot be held responsible for the quality or availability of the listed streams. On demand content is scraped from various websites and is freely available on the internet on public domains. This software acts only as a search engine. Kindly note that GreekTV By don24crk is not an official part of the media player you are running, and therefore not to be mentioned within official support channels, this addon has nothing to do with the media player itself, nor it’s intended use, it is simply a third party plugin which has been added to your system and it is provided "as is" with no warranty.
